message:
fix(fr-runtime): CLIENT LIST ID accepts 0/negative numeric ids [bd-frankenredis-ohf5]

Upstream networking.c::clientCommand parses CLIENT LIST ID values
via getLongLongFromObjectOrReply with the 'Invalid client ID'
wording — only non-numeric input errors. Numeric values that don't
match any live client (including 0 and negative) silently filter
out: lookupClientByID returns NULL and the reply is empty.

handle_client_list strictly required id > 0 and returned 'ERR
Invalid client ID' for 0 / negative. Switch to error-on-unparseable
only; non-positive numeric ids skip the requested_ids set so the
filter never matches, yielding empty output.

Differential probe vs vendored redis 7.2.4:
  CLIENT LIST ID 0   → empty (was Invalid)
  CLIENT LIST ID -1  → empty (was Invalid)
  CLIENT LIST ID abc → still 'Invalid client ID'
